name: Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Fresh Lime Juice, from about 3 limes
1/4 Cup Fresh Lemon Juice, from about 1 lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pie shell and set aside.
2. To make filling, wash limes well. Using a hand-held grater, grate the rind of limes through the small holes of the grater. Extract juice from limes and lemon.
3. Combine rind, lime and lemon juice, sweetened condensed milk, and food coloring together gently with a spoon. Avoid over mixing.
4. Pour filling into prepared pie shell and bake at 350 degrees for 5 minutes.
5. Refrigerate at least 2 hours prior to slicing.
6. Top with whipped cream.
Graham Cracker Pie Shell:
1 1/4 Cups Graham Crackers, finely crushed
2 Tablespoons Margarine, melted
2 Teaspoons Sugar
Combine all ingredients and mix well. Place in a 9-inch pie pan and pat down evenly to form the shell. Bake at 350 degrees for 5 minutes.
